title: FormatTemporalPlainDate<{lt}> — exclusive upper bound only
description: `Temporal.PlainDate` with an exclusive upper `lt` only; lower end is open
notes: Exclusive `lt`: the day before (2020-12-30) passes, but the boundary 2020-12-31 fails and so does the later 2021-06-01 — both invalid samples trip `lt`.
